parameters.content:
## Transactions grouped by operation type

Every 30 min: pulls all transactions in the last 30 min, groups
them by **transactionType** (the operation/method — GetBinary_R4,
GetDocument_R4, PatientMatch_R4, etc.), and posts a Teams summary
showing total + error count per operation.

**Setup (paste 2 values into Session + Filters):**
- sessionJson — full contents of session.json
- teamsWebhookUrl — your Teams webhook URL

**Posts on every run** (even quiet ones). To post only when there's
activity, add an IF node after Build Teams Card checking the count.

**Card is red** when any operation had errors, green when all ok.

**Daily:** session.json expires (~a day) — re-run login.js and
re-paste when runs fail with 'session expired'.
